category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers entering the EU market.

title.en: China-to-EU LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入欧盟：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入歐盟：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against EU CE marking (LVD, EMC, RoHS), Ecodesign Regulation (EU) 2019/2020, energy labelling (EU) 2019/2015, and photobiological safety requirements versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与欧盟 CE 标志（LVD、EMC、RoHS）、生态设计法规（EU）2019/2020、能效标签（EU）2019/2015 及光生物安全要求差距对照，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與歐盟 CE 標誌（LVD、EMC、RoHS）、生態設計法規（EU）2019/2020、能效標籤（EU）2019/2015 及光生物安全要求差距對照，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current EU law, harmonised standards, Ecodesign thresholds, energy labelling requirements, RoHS substance lists, and REACH SVHC obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行欧盟法律、协调标准、生态设计阈值、能效标签要求、RoHS 物质清单及 REACH SVHC 义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行歐盟法律、協調標準、生態設計閾值、能效標籤要求、RoHS 物質清單及 REACH SVHC 義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer entering the EU market must obtain CE marking under LVD (EN 60598-1), EMC (EN 55015 / EN 61547), and RoHS directives; comply with Ecodesign minimum efficacy, CRI, lifetime, and power factor requirements (Reg EU 2019/2020); ensure EU energy labelling and EPREL registration obligations are met for the light source component (Reg (EU) 2019/2015 applies to the light source / containing-product — a luminaire with a non-replaceable integrated LED source falls in scope as a light source; verify product configuration); add a rescaled A-G energy label and blue light hazard class to packaging where applicable; test the 4 EU-added phthalates not covered by China RoHS; appoint an EU Authorised Representative; and track REACH SVHC obligations biannually — none of which are covered by existing CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 进入欧盟市场的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：依据 LVD（EN 60598-1）、EMC（EN 55015 / EN 61547）及 RoHS 指令取得 CE 标志；符合生态设计最低能效、显色指数、寿命及功率因数要求（法规 EU 2019/2020）；确保满足光源组件的欧盟能效标签及 EPREL 注册义务（法规（EU）2019/2015 适用于光源/含光源产品——含不可更换集成 LED 光源的灯具本身作为光源纳入适用范围；请核查产品配置）；在适用情况下在包装上添加重新调整的 A-G 能效标签及蓝光危害等级；检测中国 RoHS 未涵盖的 4 项欧盟新增邻苯二甲酸酯；指定欧盟授权代表；并每半年跟踪 REACH SVHC 义务——上述均不被现有 CCC 认证所涵盖。
answer_first.zht: 進入歐盟市場的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：依據 LVD（EN 60598-1）、EMC（EN 55015 / EN 61547）及 RoHS 指令取得 CE 標誌；符合生態設計最低能效、顯色指數、壽命及功率因數要求（法規 EU 2019/2020）；確保滿足光源組件的歐盟能效標籤及 EPREL 注冊義務（法規（EU）2019/2015 適用於光源/含光源產品——含不可更換集成 LED 光源的燈具本身作為光源納入適用範圍；請核查產品配置）；在適用情況下在包裝上添加重新調整的 A-G 能效標籤及藍光危害等級；檢測中國 RoHS 未涵蓋的 4 項歐盟新增鄰苯二甲酸酯；指定歐盟授權代表；並每半年跟蹤 REACH SVHC 義務——上述均不被現有 CCC 認證所涵蓋。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official EU regulator, standards body, harmonised standard reference, ECHA, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Ecodesign efficacy thresholds and RoHS substance lists must be re-verified against current Annex II and ECHA Candidate List on each review cycle.
